name: resolve_mode
description: Resolve a Bubbles workflow mode (v5 name OR v6 primitive+tag form once B4 lands) to its fully-expanded YAML definition with template inheritance applied. Wraps mode-resolver.sh against bubbles/workflows.yaml. Use to discover a mode's phases, gates, status ceiling, and termination criteria before dispatch.

mode.description: Mode name (e.g. 'bugfix-fastlane', 'spec-scope-hardening'). Use '--list-modes' as the mode value to enumerate every defined mode.
